sections_cited: section 47 of the Sales Tax Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Spl.STRA No. 47 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For order on office objection Nos.01 & 02 2. For order on CMA No.841/2025 (exemption) 3. For hearing of Main Case 27.01.2026 Mr. Jamal Qamar holding brief for Mr. Kanji Mal Meghwas, advocate for applicant Per office note, this reference application is time barred. Be that as it may, the applicant remained unrepresented without any cogent reason and justification. Accordingly, this reference application is dismissed for non- prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Tax Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 of the Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Ashraf
